description: Animates an unfolded net back into its 3D solid shape. Takes a reference to an unfold3d expression and reverses the unfolding animation (flat net reassembles into 3D solid).
utility: Animate an unfolded net back into its 3D shape

arguments.name: unfoldRef
arguments.description: Reference to the unfold3d expression to refold

examples.expression:
S = cube3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 3, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
net = unfold3d(at(4,22), S, view(14,14), c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
rf = refold(at(4,40), net, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))

S = pyramid3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 4, c(brown), fc(sandybrown), fo(0.5))
net = unfold3d(at(4,22), S, view(20,20), c(brown), fc(sandybrown), fo(0.5))
rf = refold(at(4,44), net, view(14,14), c(brown), fc(sandybrown), fo(0.5))
